TextENGNew: ``Rika-chan, Satoko-chan, sorry to keep you waiting~! Come on, let's go home, let's go~!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Rena seems to be in very high spirits. Did something good happen?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh? R-Really? I feel the same as always... Why do you ask?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``You seem even more hyper than usual. You were skipping the whole way down the hall from the bathroom, you know?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...And when you came through the door, you pulled off a perfect cutback drop turn without even having a surfboard.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh... huh? I thought I was walking in normally~?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The fact that she had not even noticed was already a sign of how far gone she was, Rika and Satoko murmured simultaneously, exchanging glances.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That said, I never thought anyone could actually seal away Rena-san's 'cute' mode. Keiichi-san is more formidable than I gave him credit for~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...I hereby bestow upon him the title of Rena Killer.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``H-Hau~ You make Keiichi-kun sound like an insecticide~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...But Rena-san, you don't seem particularly upset about losing?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Well of course not~♪ After all, I get to take Rika-chan and Satoko-chan home with me~☆ Hau hau~!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``I-I don't recall agreeing to be included in this arrangement~?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Don't worry~? I'll be very gentle with you~...!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``H-How am I supposed to trust someone whose tongue is stretching out like a chameleon's and coiling around us?! How?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...She's no longer human. She's an extraterrestrial life form-- w-wait, mii~?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Rika and Satoko, fearing not just for their virtue but for their very lives, trembled and tried to make a desperate dash for the exit.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But Rena circled around to the doorway faster than they could flee, licking her lips as she locked them firmly in her embrace.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Now then, you two--time to take you home~~~!!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
